title: Customers Who Never Order
description: Bảng Customers và Orders (customerId). Trả tên khách hàng chưa từng đặt hàng nào.
approach: LEFT JOIN Customers c LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.id = o.customerId WHERE o.id IS NULL.
memoryTip: Never ordered = LEFT JOIN Orders WHERE order id IS NULL.

solutions.python:
# SQL
SELECT c.name AS Customers
FROM Customers c
LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.id = o.customerId
WHERE o.id IS NULL;

analysis.correctness: LEFT JOIN giữ mọi customer; o.id IS NULL ⇔ không có order.
edgeCases: Bảng Orders rỗng → tất cả customers
pitfalls: INNER JOIN mất khách chưa order
